name: Celery and Cabbage Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add cabbage, celery, salt, and caraway seeds.
3. Boil for 5 minutes, then drain well.
4. To make the sauce, melt butter in a pan. Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Slowly add milk to the pan while stirring continuously until the sauce is smooth and thick.
6. Gradually add beer to the sauce, stirring until foam disappears.
7. Continue cooking until heated through.
8. Stir in grated Cheddar cheese until melted.
9. Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Transfer the vegetables to a buttered 2-quart casserole dish and pour the sauce over top.
11. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
VARIATION: You can add chunks of cooked ham or corned beef to the vegetables.
SERVES: 4
